home.title: PICKLE BANG THEORY · 1 Min · 24/7
home.description: Premium indoor pickleball facility by a crossminton world champion. 1 min from Motoyawata Station, open 24/7. A premium space for all skill levels.

facility.title: FACILITY · PICKLE BANG THEORY
facility.description: State-of-the-art indoor pickleball courts with LED lighting, pro-grade surfaces, and a comfortable lounge area.

services.title: SERVICES · PICKLE BANG THEORY
services.description: Court rentals, lesson programs, event hosting, and corporate plans. Full range of services for every need.

HomeHero.tagline: FROM A SMALL DINK TO A BIG MOVEMENT

HomeConcept.title: CONCEPT
HomeConcept.imageAlt: Big Bang — Birth of the Universe
HomeConcept.lead: Just as the universe was born from the Big Bang, a new pickleball culture will spread from this place and grow into a great movement. We named this place with that vision in mind.
HomeConcept.description1: These small moments accumulate into great energy, creating a new sports culture.
HomeConcept.description2: THE PICKLE BANG THEORY aims to be the place where the "Big Bang of Pickleball" is born.
HomeConcept.catchcopy: From a small dink to a big movement.

surface.description: High-performance surface used at the world's largest tournaments and the Olympics

images.court: Overhead view of pro-spec pickleball court

decoturf.title: DecoTurf is a hard court surface used at the world's largest pickleball tournaments, tennis Grand Slams, and the Olympics. It delivers consistent bounce and outstanding durability for a world-class playing environment.
decoturf.description: At THE PICKLE BANG THEORY, we adopted DecoTurf in pursuit of an environment where players can seriously improve. We provide an authentic playing environment focused on skill development and competitive advancement.

service01.description: Hourly court rentals with unmanned check-in for easy booking. Available from 6:00 AM to 11:00 PM.

service02.description: Direct coaching from top players. Level-based programs for beginners to advanced players. Special clinics with international top players coming soon.

service03.description: Pickleball enhancement programs incorporating physical training. Conditioning at the on-site training area. Improve your game from the ground up.

service04.description: Regular original tournaments and leagues. From prize-money tournaments to league matches for all skill levels.

service05.description: Convert to a single show court for professional spectating events. Also available as a venue for cross-industry collaborations and promotional events.

HomePricing.title: PRICING
HomePricing.rentalPaddleNote: Rental paddles available for events and private bookings only
HomePricing.privateFacilityNote: For full facility private bookings including training area and lounge, or corporate use, please

HomeAbout.title: ABOUT US
HomeAbout.founderBio1: Six-time Crossminton World Championship winner. Drawing on his competitive experience with four appearances at the All Japan Badminton Championships, he founded RST Agency Inc.
HomeAbout.founderBio2: Envisioned an urban pickleball facility for players seeking a serious playing environment.

HomeAccess.parkingNote: For those arriving by car, please use nearby coin parking.

company.name: RST Agency Inc.
company.description1: RST Agency is a sports company that creates communities where people gather, challenge themselves, and grow through racket sports. We generate 'personal growth' beyond the pursuit of sports and contribute to the development of Japan's sports culture.
company.description2: We also plan and execute pickleball-focused events, organize official tournaments, and manage athletes. Our members, including the CEO, are competitive players themselves.
company.valueBusiness: Sports Facility Operations / Sports Events / Tournament Management / Sports Equipment Planning & Sales

founder.name: Akihiko Nishimura
founder.bio1: Born in Hokkaido. Started badminton at age 8, honing his competitive skills at Aomori Yamada High School and Chuo University, two of Japan's top badminton powerhouses. Reached the singles quarterfinals at both the Inter-High and the National High School Select Tournament.
founder.bio2: As a professional, he competed independently — without joining a corporate team — making four appearances at the All Japan Badminton Championships, the nation's premier tournament, and facing Japan's top players.
founder.bio3: In 2015, he transitioned to crossminton, recording six titles including four consecutive mixed doubles and two consecutive singles titles at the World Championships. Named World's Best Player.
founder.bio4: He discovered pickleball in 2023 and now works as both a player and tournament director. He incorporated the racket sports community "Racket Sports Tokyo" and serves as CEO of RST Agency Inc.

players.title: PBT Contract Players
players.description: THE PICKLE BANG THEORY contracts with pickleball players active both domestically and internationally, supporting them with training and practice at our facility. Through collaborative event appearances and social media outreach, we promote the growth of pickleball.
players.playerBio: Former tennis player. Transitioned to pickleball in 2024, with multiple top finishes in domestic tournaments. Known for his aggressive playing style.

crew.title: PBT Crew
crew.description: Meet the crew members who support and steer THE PICKLE BANG THEORY.

news.title: News
news.body: Crossminton World Champion Akihiko Nishimura to open urban pickleball facility 'THE PICKLE BANG THEORY' 1 min from Motoyawata Station in spring 2026

contact.errorMessage: Failed to send. Please try again.

story.paragraph1: ust as the Big Bang gave birth to the universe, this place aims to spread a new pickleball culture. Not just court rentals—we designed an environment from scratch for players serious about growth.
story.paragraph2: Regardless of age or level, this is a place where those serious about improvement can focus on practice and keep pushing forward. Our founder, with world-class competitive experience, stands on the court and supports every player’s growth. This is where it all begins.

amenities.airConditioningDesc: Optimal temperature maintained year-round. Comfortable play even in midsummer.
amenities.changingRoomDesc: Clean, separate changing areas for men and women. Showers available.
amenities.trainingAreaDesc: Dedicated space for off-court physical conditioning.
amenities.loungeDesc: A relaxing area for watching matches and meetings.
amenities.rentalDesc: Paddle and ball rentals available. Come empty-handed.
amenities.unmannedDesc: Smart lock & QR authentication for smooth 24-hour entry and exit.

founder.timeline3: Inter-High & National HS Select: Singles Quarterfinals
founder.timeline6: World Championships: 4 consecutive mixed doubles titles, 2 consecutive singles titles (6 total)
